five_layer_learning.real_commercial_usecase: Run 2.9 continues the same commercial PPT design usecase rather than advancing to Run 3.0.
five_layer_learning.multimodal_tutorial_case_database: Run 2.9 consumes the existing tutorial/case/video-derived learning and the Run 2.8 boxiness diagnosis through run2_9_visual_primitive_repair.json.
five_layer_learning.design_memory: run2_9_executable_visual_modules.json turns the visual primitive repairs into concrete native function contracts.
five_layer_learning.skill_workflow: run2_9_visual_gate_matrix.json requires primitive ids, module ids, gate ids, actual code module ids, boxiness failure probes, and visual delta from Run 2.8.
five_layer_learning.code_generated_native_ppt: run2_9_full_skill generated native editable PPT shapes and records actual drawRun29 visual module calls in trace_manifest.json.

qa_summary.browser_viewer_check: passed; latest run is 2.9 and no console errors were reported
qa_summary.trace_truthfulness_guard: passed; run2_9_code_module_ids are populated from actual visualModuleIds captured during rendering

visual_learning.useful_delta: Run 2.9 full visibly changes the four-arm comparison: it uses typographic fields, editorial asymmetry, layered product surfaces, motion storyboards, and a dark climax stage instead of equal cards and report panels.
visual_learning.gemini_four_arm_summary: Gemini judged Run 2.9 full as a clear four-arm visual winner with stronger asymmetry, hierarchy, and custom composition.
visual_learning.gemini_full_series_caution: Gemini also judged Run 2.7, 2.8, and 2.9 as sharing a similar visual system; Run 2.9 is mainly a structural/compositional improvement, not a fully new aesthetic direction.
visual_learning.release_correction: Even when Gemini calls the contact sheet public-demo ready visually, the project gate remains public blocked until native render inspection, source-brand sanitization review, motion/render support, and human approval pass.
visual_learning.remaining_visual_gap: The next loop should make the visual system itself more distinctive and less rectangle-led while keeping code-generated native PPT editability.

control_boundary.prompt_only: commercial_case_only; all Run 2.9 visual primitive/module/gate inputs are forbidden
control_boundary.run1_5_skill: commercial_case_plus_run1_5_only; all Run 2.9 visual primitive/module/gate inputs are forbidden
control_boundary.bad_visual_primitive_memory: commercial_case_plus_visual_primitive_repair_only; executable visual modules and gate matrix are forbidden

next_required_action: Continue the same five layers: improve source/tutorial/video decomposition quality, make visual primitive memory more specific, harden workflow gates, and produce another code-generated native PPT rerun focused on a more distinctive visual system rather than palette or box count.
